bosses.name: Mogger
tips: 💥 **Ground Pound** — 14–20 AoE every 10s within 8yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 70% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.
🔴 Enrages below 30% HP (+60% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.
🛡 **Bracing Order** — shields allies (70 absorb) every 12s. Focus it down first.

bosses.name: Captain Verlan
tips: 💥 **Hollow Nova** — 13–19 AoE every 9s within 9yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
🔴 Enrages below 30% HP (+50% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Grix the Tunnelking
tips: 💥 **Cave-In** — 12–18 AoE every 9s within 8yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 55%, 30% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.
🔴 Enrages below 30% HP (+40% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Wraithbinder Maldrec
tips: 💥 **Grave Chill** — 13–19 AoE every 9s within 9yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 65%, 35% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.
🔴 Enrages below 30% HP (+50% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Funeral Ringer
tips: 💥 **Funeral Chime** — 5–9 AoE every 4s within 6yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.

bosses.name: Deacon Varric
tips: 🦶 **Bell Toll** — AoE stun + 14–22 dmg every 12s (8yd). Don't clump; expect to be stunned.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 60%, 30% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.
🔴 Enrages below 20% HP (+40% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Deepfen Snapper
tips: ⏩ **Tide Cadence** — hastes allies' swings. Priority kill.

bosses.name: Mirejaw the Ravenous
tips: 💥 **Ravenous Frenzy** — 18–26 AoE every 9s within 10yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 55% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.

bosses.name: Morthen the Gravecaller
tips: 💥 **Shadow Pulse** — 12–18 AoE every 10s within 12yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.

bosses.name: Sloomtooth the Drowned
tips: 🩹 Self-heals 25% once below 30% HP. Burst through it.

bosses.name: Deacon Voss
tips: 💥 **Drowning Hymn** — 10–14 AoE every 12s within 10yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.

bosses.name: Gravecaller Mender
tips: 💚 **Grave Mending** — heals nearby allies 26–38 every 6s. Kill or pull it away from its friends.

bosses.name: Sister Nhalia
tips: 💥 **Dirge of Nhalia** — 18–26 AoE every 9s within 11yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
😱 **Keening Wail** — fears everyone nearby every 16s. Fight near a wall so you don't run far.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 65%, 35% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.

bosses.name: Drowned Cantor
tips: 💚 **Litany Pulse** — heals nearby allies 12–18 every 4s. Kill or pull it away from its friends.

bosses.name: Grave-Silt Bulwark
tips: 🛡 **Silt Ward** — shields allies (45 absorb) every 9s. Focus it down first.

bosses.name: Tidebound Acolyte
tips: 🩹 Self-heals 25% once below 30% HP. Burst through it.

bosses.name: Vael the Fogbinder
tips: 💥 **Mist Surge** — 16–24 AoE every 10s within 12yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 60%, 30% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.

bosses.name: Old Cragmaw
tips: 💥 **Savage Pounce** — 22–30 AoE every 9s within 8yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
🔴 Enrages below 35% HP (+40% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Sump Troll Devourer
tips: 🦶 **Sump Stomp** — AoE stun + 10–16 dmg every 10s (6yd). Don't clump; expect to be stunned.
🪨 **Silt Hide** — self-shield (70 absorb) every 11s. Time your burst between shields.

bosses.name: Ironvein Foreman
tips: 💥 **Powder Keg** — 28–38 AoE every 10s within 8yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 50% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.
🔴 Enrages below 30% HP (+45% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.
⚔️ **Rallying Banner** — buffs allies' attack power. Priority kill.

bosses.name: Brutok Skullsmasher
tips: 💥 **Skull Smash** — 22–30 AoE every 10s within 10yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
🔴 Enrages below 30% HP (+50% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Warlord Drogmar
tips: 💥 **Ground Slam** — 22–30 AoE every 12s within 10yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
📈 **Mounting Rage** — gains attack power the longer it stays in melee (up to 5 stacks). Breaking melee / kiting resets it.

bosses.name: Ysolei, Avatar of the Drowned Moon
tips: 💥 **Lunar Tide** — 22–32 AoE every 9s within 13yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 60%, 30% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.
🔴 Enrages below 30% HP (+40% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Marrowlord Varkas
tips: 💥 **Marrow Rot** — 30–42 AoE every 9s within 11yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 66%, 33% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.
🪨 **Bone Carapace** — self-shield (260 absorb) every 14s. Time your burst between shields.

bosses.name: Voskar the Emberwing
tips: 💥 **Ember Breath** — 30–44 AoE every 9s within 10yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
🔴 Enrages below 30% HP (+50% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Corrupted Priest Malric
tips: 💥 **Shadow Nova** — 28–42 AoE every 8s within 16yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
💚 **Profane Mending** — heals nearby allies 48–70 every 7s. Kill or pull it away from its friends.

bosses.name: Grand Necromancer Velkhar
tips: ➕ Summons 3× adds at 66%, 33% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.

bosses.name: Korgath the Bound
tips: 🦶 **Shuddering Stomp** — AoE stun + 20–30 dmg every 12s (10yd). Don't clump; expect to be stunned.
🔴 Enrages below 30% HP (+50% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Korzul the Gravewyrm
tips: 💥 **Necrotic Shockwave** — 30–42 AoE every 8s within 14yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
🔴 Enrages below 30% HP (+50% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Nythraxis, Scourge of Thornpeak
tips: ☠️ **Death Decree** — Nythraxis periodically charges a raid-wide death attack; watch the cast bar under his HP. Reach and trigger the **pillars** before it finishes to interrupt it.
🏛 **Pillars take time to charge** — send people early. If you're too slow to the pillars, it's gg (raid wipe).

bosses.name: The Bound Guardian
tips: 💥 **Sealbreak Shockwave** — 30–44 AoE every 10s within 10yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 50% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.
🔴 Enrages below 25% HP (+45% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.

bosses.name: Thunzharr, the Waking Peak
tips: 💥 **Thunderclap** — 36–50 AoE every 8s within 12yd. Heal through it or keep your distance.
🦶 **Seismic Stomp** — AoE stun + 18–28 dmg every 16s (11yd). Don't clump; expect to be stunned.
➕ Summons 2× adds at 66%, 33% HP. Kill adds fast or burst past the threshold.
🔴 Enrages below 20% HP (+50% damage, faster swings). Save defensives for the execute phase.
🪨 **Mountainhide** — self-shield (500 absorb) every 18s. Time your burst between shields.
